name: your-spotify
title: Your Spotify
description: Self-hosted Spotify listening history tracker and statistics dashboard. Includes a client web UI and a backend API server that connects to the Spotify API to track and visualize your listening habits.

variables.name: PORT_CLIENT_SPOTIFY
variables.label: Client Port
variables.description: Port for the Your Spotify web dashboard

variables.name: PORT_SERVER_SPOTIFY
variables.label: Server Port
variables.description: Port for the Your Spotify API server

variables.name: SPOTIFY_API_ENDPOINT
variables.label: API Endpoint URL
variables.description: Public URL where the API server is accessible (e.g. https://spotify-api.example.com)

variables.name: SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ENDPOINT
variables.label: Client Endpoint URL
variables.description: Public URL where the client dashboard is accessible (e.g. https://spotify.example.com)

variables.name: SPOTIFY_PUBLIC
variables.label: Spotify Client ID
variables.description: Spotify API application client ID (from developer.spotify.com)

variables.name: MONGO_PORT
variables.label: MongoDB Port
variables.description: Port for the MongoDB database (internal use)
